# 'gs anchor list' shows all worktrees
# with their checked-out branches and stack info.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2026-03-29T14:00:00Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# Create a stack: main -> feat1 -> feat2
git add feat1.txt
gs bc feat1 -m 'Add feat1'
git add feat2.txt
gs bc feat2 -m 'Add feat2'

# Create a worktree for feat1
git worktree add ../wt1 feat1

# List worktrees from the main repo
gs anchor list
stderr 'repo'
stderr 'feat2'
stderr 'wt1'
stderr 'feat1'

# List worktrees from wt1
cd ../wt1
gs anchor ls
stderr 'repo'
stderr 'wt1'
stderr 'feat1'

-- repo/feat1.txt --
feat1
-- repo/feat2.txt --
feat2
